payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet showing three recessed rectangular panel doors with a varnished sheen and narrow horizontal metal handles near the top of the panels; the lower portion is cut off by the image edge and the finish shows slight surface wear and grain variation — estimated distance about 1.2 m from camera.
